opportunity.role: Senior Director of Product, Robotics Platform

next_action: Explore only if platform leadership outweighs the lack of direct robotics evidence

mandate_authority.rationale: Owns platform vision, portfolio, investments, and ecosystem.

domain_fit.rationale: Strong AI and developer-platform fit but no direct robotics background.

leadership_scope.rationale: Leads product leaders and a broad technical organization.

evidence_match.rationale: Platform and ecosystem stories transfer, but autonomy and hardware evidence are absent.

career_growth.rationale: Would add hardware-software and autonomy exposure.

product_quality.rationale: Interesting technical platform and customer problem.

practical_fit.rationale: San Francisco works, but hybrid and travel requirements need confirmation.
